system_memory.rationale: Always wrap calculation formulas in IFERROR(..., 0) to prevent cascading #DIV/0! and #VALUE! errors in downstream aggregations. Sourced from Phase 8 debugging.
Institutional LBOs require circular debt sculpting (Interest Expense -> Avg Debt Balance -> CFADS -> Taxes -> Tax Shield -> Interest Expense). Requires wb.calculation.iterate = True.
For Google Sheets compatibility, use linear standard interest formulas (Beg_Debt * Rate) instead of average debt, to avoid #REF! iteration failures.
Provide analysts with visibility into which cells had errors suppressed to 0 natively. Ghost Note placed in Audit Signature cell.
